---
title: 'About us'
---

# About us

COST Action CA23130 BridgeQG

- BridgeQG Core Group

	- [![giuliagubitosi](https://github.com/giuliagubitosi.png?size=40){.rounded-circle width=40px height=40px}](https://github.com/giuliagubitosi) &nbsp;&nbsp; [Giulia Gubitosi](https://github.com/giuliagubitosi)
	- [![tterzic](https://github.com/tterzic.png?size=40){.rounded-circle width=40px height=40px}](https://github.com/tterzic) &nbsp;&nbsp; [Tomislav Terzić](https://github.com/tterzic)
	- [![Flavio-Mercati](https://github.com/Flavio-Mercati.png?size=40){.rounded-circle width=40px height=40px}](https://github.com/Flavio-Mercati) &nbsp;&nbsp; [Flavio Mercati](https://github.com/Flavio-Mercati)
	- [![jackderosis](https://github.com/jackderosis.png?size=40){.rounded-circle width=40px height=40px}](https://github.com/jackderosis) &nbsp;&nbsp; [Giacomo Rosati](https://github.com/jackderosis)

- Webpage preparation and deployment

	- [![MKReyesH](https://github.com/MKReyesH.png?size=40){.rounded-circle width=40px height=40px}](https://github.com/MKReyesH) &nbsp;&nbsp; [Maykoll Reyes](https://github.com/MKReyesH)

# Powered By

- [GitHub Pages](https://pages.github.com/): Hosting and deployment infrastructure.
- [Quarto](https://quarto.org/): Markdown rendering, cross-referencing, and website generation.
- [Pandoc](https://pandoc.org/): Document format translation.
- [Bootstrap](https://getbootstrap.com/) and [Bootswatch](https://bootswatch.com/): CSS support and user interface.
- [MathJax](https://www.mathjax.org/): Mathematical notation rendering.
- [Gemini](https://gemini.google.com/app): Help writing the Lua filters.
